---
title: "Winter Storm Fern Situation Report - January 2026"
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  output: false
  echo: false
fig-pos: H
format:
  pdf:
    colorlinks: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
---

# FUNCTIONS

## Latitude and Longitude

```{r}

# Assign coordinates to counties

# convert latitude/longitude points into sf objects, then join them to county polygons
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tigris)
library(readr)
library(here)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

# Get US county boundaries
counties_sf <- counties(cb = TRUE, year = 2023) |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  select(
    county_state = STATE_NAME,
    county_name = NAME,
    county_geoid = GEOID,
    geometry
  )


add_county_from_coords <- function(df, lat_col, lon_col, prefix = "") {
  
  points_sf <- df |>
    filter(!is.na(.data[[lat_col]]), !is.na(.data[[lon_col]])) |>
    st_as_sf(
      coords = c(lon_col, lat_col),
      crs = 4326,
      remove = FALSE
    )
  
  joined <- st_join(points_sf, counties_sf, join = st_within)
  
  joined |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    rename(
      "{prefix}county_state" := county_state,
      "{prefix}county_name" := county_name,
      "{prefix}county_geoid" := county_geoid
    )
}
```

## Aggregate CSVs

```{r}
aggregate_csvs <- function(path_parts,
                           output_name = "aggregated.csv",
                           dedupe = TRUE,
                           lat_col = NULL,
                           lon_col = NULL,
                           prefix = "") {
  
  data_dir <- do.call(here::here, as.list(path_parts))
  
  cat("Reading from:", data_dir, "\n")
  
  # Stop execution if the directory does not exist
  if (!dir.exists(data_dir)) {
    stop("Directory does not exist: ", data_dir)
  }
  
  # Get all CSV files in the directory
  csv_files <- list.files(
    path = data_dir,
    pattern = "\\.csv$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  # Stop if no CSV files are found
  if (length(csv_files) == 0) {
    stop("No CSV files found in: ", data_dir)
  }
  
  cat("Found", length(csv_files), "files\n")
  
  # Read each CSV file and add a column indicating its source file
  # Then combine all files into a single dataframe
  combined_data <- lapply(csv_files, function(f) {
    read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
      mutate(source_file = basename(f))
  }) |>
    bind_rows()
  
  # Remove exact duplicate rows
  if (dedupe) {
    combined_data <- combined_data |> distinct()
  }
  
  # If latitude and longitude columns are provided, assign each row to a county using spatial join
  if (!is.null(lat_col) && !is.null(lon_col)) {
    cat("Adding county identifiers...\n")
    
    combined_data <- add_county_from_coords(
      df = combined_data,
      lat_col = lat_col,
      lon_col = lon_col,
      prefix = prefix   # allows naming like start_county_*, end_county_*
    )
  }
  
  # Extract date and time from file names for data sets that don't contain them
  combined_data <- combined_data |>
  mutate(
    ds = as.Date(sub(".*_(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})_.*", "\\1", source_file)),
    hour = sub(".*_(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})_(\\d{4}).*", "\\2", source_file)
  )
  
  # Define output directory at the project root (Outputs/)
  output_dir <- here::here("Outputs")
  
  # Create the directory if it doesn't already exist
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Build full output file path
  output_file <- file.path(output_dir, output_name)
  
  # Write the combined dataset to CSV
  write_csv(combined_data, output_file)
  
  # Print basic logging info
  cat("Saved to:", output_file, "\n")
  cat("Rows:", nrow(combined_data), "\n")
  
  # Return the final dataframe to the environment
  return(combined_data)
}
```

## Fast Aggregate Counties

```{r}
add_movement_counties_fast <- function(df,
                                       start_lat = "start_latitude",
                                       start_lon = "start_longitude",
                                       end_lat = "end_latitude",
                                       end_lon = "end_longitude") {
  
  # County lookup for unique origin coordinates only
  start_lookup <- df %>%
    distinct(
      .data[[start_lat]],
      .data[[start_lon]]
    ) %>%
    add_county_from_coords(
      lat_col = start_lat,
      lon_col = start_lon,
      prefix = "start_"
    )
  
  # Join origin county fields back to full data
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(
      start_lookup,
      by = setNames(c(start_lat, start_lon), c(start_lat, start_lon))
    )
  
  # County lookup for unique destination coordinates only
  end_lookup <- df %>%
    distinct(
      .data[[end_lat]],
      .data[[end_lon]]
    ) %>%
    add_county_from_coords(
      lat_col = end_lat,
      lon_col = end_lon,
      prefix = "end_"
    )
  
  # Join destination county fields back to full data
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(
      end_lookup,
      by = setNames(c(end_lat, end_lon), c(end_lat, end_lon))
    )
  
  return(df)
}
```

## Summary Statistics

```{r}
analyze_dataset <- function(df) {
  list(
    missing = df |>
      summarise(across(everything(), ~mean(is.na(.)))),

    numeric_summary = df |>
      summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
                       list(mean = mean, sd = sd),
                       na.rm = TRUE)),

    n_rows = nrow(df),
    n_cols = ncol(df)
  )
}
```

## Demographics

Request [API key here](https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html)

```{r}
library(tidycensus)

# You only need to run this once if you have not already set a Census API key
#census_api_key("insert_your_census_key", install = TRUE, overwrite = TRUE)

# Pull county-level ACS demographics
get_county_demographics <- function(year = 2022) {
  
  demo_vars <- c(
    total_population = "B01003_001",
    median_income = "B19013_001",
    poverty_count = "B17001_002",
    total_poverty_universe = "B17001_001",
    age_65_plus = "B01001_020",
    age_65_plus_female = "B01001_044",
    total_age = "B01001_001",
    no_vehicle_households = "B08201_002",
    total_households_vehicle = "B08201_001"
  )
  
  demographics <- get_acs(
    geography = "county",
    variables = demo_vars,
    year = year,
    survey = "acs5",
    output = "wide",
    geometry = FALSE
  ) |>
    transmute(
      county_geoid = GEOID,
      county_name_acs = NAME,
      total_population = total_populationE,
      median_income = median_incomeE,
      poverty_rate = poverty_countE / total_poverty_universeE,
      pct_age_65_plus = (age_65_plusE + age_65_plus_femaleE) / total_ageE,
      pct_no_vehicle = no_vehicle_householdsE / total_households_vehicleE
    )
  
  return(demographics)
}

# 2024 is latest that works
county_demographics <- get_county_demographics(year = 2024)

write_csv(
  county_demographics,
  here("Outputs", "county_demographics_acs.csv")
)
```

```{r}
# Helper to join demographics

add_demographics <- function(df,
                             demographics = county_demographics,
                             geoid_col = "county_geoid",
                             prefix = "") {
  
  demographics_to_join <- demographics
  
  # If prefix is supplied, rename demographic columns before joining
  # Example: start_total_population, end_median_income, etc.
  if (prefix != "") {
    demographics_to_join <- demographics_to_join |>
      rename_with(
        ~ paste0(prefix, .x),
        .cols = -county_geoid
      )
  }
  
  df |>
    left_join(
      demographics_to_join,
      by = setNames("county_geoid", geoid_col)
    )
}
```


# DATA AGGREGATION

## General

```{r}
##### ------ Business Activity ------ #####
ba_data <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data","Fern_General", "Business_Activity"),
  output_name = "business_activity_aggregated.csv",
  lat_col = "latitude",
  lon_col = "longitude",
  prefix = "")

ba_data <- add_demographics(
  df = ba_data,
  geoid_col = "county_geoid"
)

write_csv(
  ba_data,
  here("Outputs", "business_activity_aggregated.csv")
)
```

```{r, execute=FALSE}
mp_data <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Fern_General", "Movement_between_Places"),
  output_name = "movement_between_places_aggregated.csv"
)

mp_data <- add_movement_counties_fast(mp_data)

write_csv(
  mp_data,
  here("Outputs", "movement_between_places_aggregated.csv")
)

```

```{r}
##### ------ Summary Statistics ------ #####
analyze_dataset(ba_data)
analyze_dataset(mp_data)
```

## Tennessee and Kentucky

```{r}
##### ------ Movement Between Places During a Crisis ------ #####

tk_mp_data_admin <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Tennessee_Kentucky", "Fern_Movement_Crisis", "Administrative_Regions"),
  output_name = "tk_movement_between_places_aggregated_admin.csv"
)

tk_mp_data_admin <- add_movement_counties_fast(tk_mp_data_admin)

tk_mp_data_admin <- tk_mp_data_admin |>
  add_demographics(
    geoid_col = "start_county_geoid",
    prefix = "start_"
  ) |>
  add_demographics(
    geoid_col = "end_county_geoid",
    prefix = "end_"
  )

write_csv(
  tk_mp_data_admin,
  here("Outputs", "tk_movement_between_places_aggregated_admin.csv")
)


```

```{r}
tk_mp_data_bing <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Tennessee_Kentucky", "Fern_Movement_Crisis", "Bing_Tiles"),
  output_name = "tk_movement_between_places_aggregated_bing.csv"
)

tk_mp_data_bing <- add_movement_counties_fast(tk_mp_data_bing)

tk_mp_data_bing <- tk_mp_data_bing |>
  add_demographics(
    geoid_col = "start_county_geoid",
    prefix = "start_"
  ) |>
  add_demographics(
    geoid_col = "end_county_geoid",
    prefix = "end_"
  )

write_csv(
  tk_mp_data_bing,
  here("Outputs", "tk_movement_between_places_aggregated_bing.csv")
)

```

```{r}
##### ------ Facebook Population during crisis ------ #####
tk_fb_data_admin <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Tennessee_Kentucky", "Fern_Facebook_Pop_Crisis", "Administrative_Regions"),
  output_name = "tk_facebook_pop_aggregated_admin.csv",
  lat_col = "latitude",
  lon_col = "longitude",
  prefix = ""
)

tk_fb_data_admin <- add_demographics(
  df = tk_fb_data_admin,
  geoid_col = "county_geoid"
)

write_csv(
  tk_fb_data_admin,
  here("Outputs", "tk_facebook_pop_aggregated_admin.csv")
)
```

```{r}
tk_fb_data_bing <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Tennessee_Kentucky", "Fern_Facebook_Pop_Crisis", "Bing_Tiles"),
  output_name = "tk_facebook_pop_aggregated_bing.csv",
  lat_col = "latitude",
  lon_col = "longitude",
  prefix = ""
)

tk_fb_data_bing <- add_demographics(
  df = tk_fb_data_bing,
  geoid_col = "county_geoid"
)

write_csv(
  tk_fb_data_bing,
  here("Outputs", "tk_facebook_pop_aggregated_bing.csv")
)
```

```{r}

##### ------ Network Coverage ------ #####

tk_nc_data_active <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Tennessee_Kentucky", "Fern_Network_Coverage", "Active"),
  output_name = "tk_network_coverage_aggregated_active.csv",
  lat_col = "lat",
  lon_col = "lon",
  prefix = ""
)

tk_nc_data_active <- add_demographics(
  df = tk_nc_data_active,
  geoid_col = "county_geoid"
)

write_csv(
  tk_nc_data_active,
  here("Outputs", "tk_network_coverage_aggregated_active.csv")
)
```

```{r}
tk_nc_data_undetected <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Data", "Tennessee_Kentucky", "Fern_Network_Coverage", "Undetected"),
  output_name = "tk_network_coverage_aggregated_undetected.csv",
  lat_col = "lat",
  lon_col = "lon",
  prefix = ""
)

tk_nc_data_undetected <- add_demographics(
  df = tk_nc_data_undetected,
  geoid_col = "county_geoid"
)

write_csv(
  tk_nc_data_undetected,
  here("Outputs", "tk_network_coverage_aggregated_undetected.csv")
)
```
